b:Te862,<div class="specification">
<p>The graph shows a theoretical model that divides species into five ecological groups (I to V) related to the degree of tolerance to an increasing pollution gradient.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: center;">[Reprinted from <em>Marine Pollution Bulletin</em>, <em>40</em>, A. Borja, J. Franco and V. Perez, 'A marine biotic index to establish the ecological quality of soft-bottom benthos within European estuarine and coastal environments', pp. 1100–1114, Copyright (2000), with permission from Elsevier. https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/marine-pollution-bulletin]</p>
</div><div class="specification">
<p>The biotic index is calculated using the formula shown.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><span class="mjpage"><math alttext="{\text{BI}} = \frac{{\Sigma \left( {{{\text{n}}_{\text{i}}} \times {{\text{a}}_{\text{i}}}} \right)}}{N}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mrow>
<mtext>BI</mtext>
</mrow>
<mo>=</mo>
<mfrac>
<mrow>
<mi mathvariant="normal">Σ<!-- Σ --></mi>
<mrow>
<mo>(</mo>
<mrow>
<mrow>
<msub>
<mrow>
<mtext>n</mtext>
</mrow>
<mrow>
<mtext>i</mtext>
</mrow>
</msub>
</mrow>
<mo>×<!-- × --></mo>
<mrow>
<msub>
<mrow>
<mtext>a</mtext>
</mrow>

</mrow>
</msub>
</mrow>
</mrow>
<mo>)</mo>
</mrow>
</mrow>
<mi>N</mi>
</mfrac>
</math></span></p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Identify the group that is most intolerant to pollution.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Deduce the meaning of n<sub>i</sub> in this formula.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Deduce the meaning of a<sub>i</sub> in this formula.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Outline how organisms in Group V could be used to measure pollution in an environment.</p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
